office_does: The county coroner investigates reportable deaths, determines cause and manner of death, maintains records, and works with families and public-safety agencies.
race_blurb: Incumbent Cori McKean faces former deputy coroner Charlie Divine; both present medicolegal death-investigation experience.

candidates.summary: Incumbent coroner with D-ABMDI death-investigation credentials.
highlights: Leads the county coroner office and holds D-ABMDI credentials [S2][S3]
Emphasizes accurate investigations, family dignity, and continuity of accredited operations [S2][S3]

experience.basis: Incumbency, professional certification, and responsibility for accredited office operations establish a record-based profile, though the dossier does not establish long tenure.

candidates.summary: Former deputy coroner and Washington-certified medicolegal forensic death investigator.
highlights: Recently served as a Kittitas County deputy coroner [S2][S3]
Emphasizes accurate investigations, transparency, compassion, and interdepartmental cooperation [S2]

experience.basis: Direct deputy-coroner service and state medicolegal certification establish substantial relevant experience short of incumbency.
